title: Cursor-Based Pagination Utility
description: A generic, type-safe cursor-based pagination utility for TypeScript arrays.

stories.title: Basic first-page pagination
stories.description: Given an array of items and a page size, return the first page with correct data, nextCursor, and hasMore flag.
stories.testPattern: returns correct data for first page

stories.title: Cursor-based continuation
stories.description: Given a nextCursor from a previous page, return the correct subsequent page of items.
stories.testPattern: returns correct nextCursor for subsequent pages

stories.title: Last page detection
stories.description: When the final page of items is returned, hasMore should be false and nextCursor should be null.
stories.testPattern: returns hasMore: false on last page

stories.title: Empty dataset handling
stories.description: When given an empty array, return an empty result without throwing an error.

stories.title: Generic type safety
stories.description: The paginate function should preserve TypeScript generics so callers get type-safe results.

stories.title: Variable page sizes
stories.description: Pagination should work correctly with any page size (1, 2, 5, full dataset).

stories.title: Cursor encoding/decoding
stories.description: Cursors should be base64-encoded item IDs that decode correctly for continuation.
